## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent traffic drop likely due to Google algorithm update + holiday weekend; focus on defending high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Shift strategy to 30% moat building, 30% content refresh, 30% new articles (prioritizing commercial/transactional)](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Implement hero images on blog posts to potentially improve EAT signals](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [100 backlinks in queue for gradual implementation (10-15/week)](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and Strategy

  - [Recent traffic drop attributed to Google algorithm update and Memorial Day weekend](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Google's AI mode testing causing fluctuations, but traffic expected to stabilize](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Shift focus to AEO (AI Engine Optimization) and transactional queries](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [New strategy: 30% moat building, 30% content refresh, 30% new articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Prioritize commercial/transactional content for better ROI](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Content Refresh and Creation

  - [Pause on new non-commercial/transactional articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Continue with commercial/transactional articles at current rate](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Implement content refreshes to defend high-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Carrie developed a workflow for efficient content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

### Technical Issues and Updates

  - [GitHub image upload issue due to CTO's file storage changes](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Carrie to send images directly to Adrian for now](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

### CTAs and Conversion Optimization

  - [Focus on maximizing conversion rate for incoming traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Implement more natural, inline CTAs in transactional content](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Recent customers coming from ChatGPT, emphasizing AEO importance](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Hero Images for Blog Posts

  - [Dave suggested implementing hero images to improve EAT signals](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Adrian agreed to test adding H1 text + author info on template images](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Will track impact on page performance and positions](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [100 backlinks in queue for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Plan to add 10-15 backlinks per week to maintain organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Dashboard (Google Sheet/Doc) to be created for tracking placed backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/Ry_g-mQdnooX5nPDQFE2-ySwP8Jz1_HR?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)

## Next Steps
